title: Backing your business: our plan for small and medium-sized businesses
body: "Backing your business: our plan for small and medium-sized businesses sets out a long-term direction for the government’s support for smaller firms. It places their growth and productivity potential at its core, while improving the operating environment to start and run a business.  We will make the UK the best place to start and grow a business, with a culture that supports businesses in every community and high street.  "
